mission: Sharpen the remaining Paper 35 baryogenesis debts by reducing the portal coefficient sector to its exact invariants and the source-abundance sector to its exact seed/transport bottleneck.

theorem_1_portal_invariant_reduction.statement: Inside the unique type-I portal class on the hierarchical N1 slice, the full Yukawa/Majorana matrices are not needed directly by the baryogenesis observable map. All source-side observables relevant to the late-time target reduce to the invariant data (M1, (Y^dagger Y)11, epsilon1). Equivalently, one may use (M1, m_tilde1, epsilon1) with m_tilde1 = v^2 (Y^dagger Y)11 / M1.
why_exact: The tree-level decay width depends only on (Y^dagger Y)11 and M1.
The one-flavor CP asymmetry depends on Y,M only through epsilon1.
The exact late-time target reduction already fixed epsilon1 * kappa_f.
Casas-Ibarra nonuniqueness shows the remaining coefficient debt survives only through these invariants, not through a need to carry the full matrices explicitly in the observable map.

theorem_2_neutral_seed_closure.statement: On the admitted fermionic/CAR extension, the boundary seed side of the neutral collective carrier is already closed. The canonical beta_H-KMS quasi-free CAR state fixes the one-particle covariance, and by the standard quasi-free CAR/Wick property it fixes all even neutral composite correlators on A_neutral^(2). Therefore no independent boundary abundance parameter remains on the seed side.

imports.boundary_seed_statement: On the new fermionic lowest-shell bridge quotient, the canonical boundary seed is the beta_H-KMS quasi-free CAR state.

theorem_3_source_abundance_residual_obje.statement: Because the seed covariance is fixed and radial spin transport is geometrically fixed, the source-abundance debt is not an arbitrary boundary-history freedom. It reduces exactly to the support-side identification problem: a theorem mapping transported neutral even-CAR composite data to an effective singlet source abundance, together with any genuinely number-changing support interaction if such an interaction exists.
exact_remaining_source_objects: C_N: collective identification / coarse-graining map from transported neutral even-CAR correlators to an effective singlet abundance
W_N: a number-changing support interaction, if the active source is not free-transported
theorem_3_source_abundance_residual_obje.safe_boundary: Without a theorem fixing C_N, and without a theorem killing or deriving W_N, the nonthermal source-abundance sector cannot be closed further.

final_boundary.safe_statement: The Paper 35 baryogenesis frontier is now reduced as far as the current stack permits. The coefficient debt is exactly the invariant selector (M1, m_tilde1, epsilon1), and the source-abundance debt is exactly the support-side pair (C_N, W_N). No further theorem-grade reduction remains without new microphysics.
